AboutPage.hero_subtitle: Crafting warmth and comfort for your little ones, one stitch at a time
AboutPage.story_paragraph_1: Loop by Family was born from a simple desire: to create beautiful, handcrafted wooly accessories that keep children warm and happy. What started as a hobby in our family home has blossomed into a passionate mission to bring quality, sustainable, and lovingly made products to families around the world.
AboutPage.story_paragraph_2: Every piece we create tells a story of dedication, craftsmanship, and love. We believe that the best things in life are made by hand, with care and attention to every detail. Our journey began when we welcomed our first child and couldn't find accessories that matched our values of quality, sustainability, and timeless design.
AboutPage.story_paragraph_3: Today, Loop by Family is more than a brand—it's a community of parents, artisans, and families who believe in the power of handmade products to create lasting memories and comfort.
AboutPage.values_subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
AboutPage.value_quality_description: We use only the finest natural wool and materials, ensuring every piece is soft, durable, and gentle on delicate skin. Quality is never compromised.
AboutPage.value_sustainability_description: We're committed to eco-friendly practices, from ethically sourced materials to minimal waste production. Our planet matters as much as our products.
AboutPage.value_love_description: Every stitch is made with care and attention. We treat each piece as if it were for our own children, because to us, quality is personal.
AboutPage.process_subtitle: From wool to wonderful, here's how we create each piece
AboutPage.process_step1_description: We carefully source premium, ethically-produced natural wool from trusted suppliers who share our values.
AboutPage.process_step2_description: Each design is thoughtfully created with both style and functionality in mind, ensuring timeless appeal.
AboutPage.process_step3_description: Our skilled artisans handcraft each piece using traditional techniques passed down through generations.
AboutPage.team_subtitle: The passionate people behind Loop by Family
AboutPage.team_member1_bio: The main pillar of the company, Lidia is responsible for preparing products for you and your little ones
AboutPage.team_member2_bio: With her creativity and dedication, Klaudia was able to initiate our business, which you can now enjoy
AboutPage.cta_title: Ready to Experience Loop by Family?
AboutPage.cta_subtitle: Discover our collection of handcrafted wooly accessories for your little ones

ContactPage.hero_subtitle: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question, custom order request, or just want to say hello
ContactPage.form_description: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
ContactPage.form_message_placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
ContactPage.info_description: Prefer to reach out directly? Here are all the ways you can contact us.
ContactPage.faq_a1: Standard shipping within Poland typically takes 2-4 business days. International shipping varies by destination, usually 5-10 business days. Express shipping options are available at checkout.
ContactPage.faq_a2: Absolutely! We love creating custom pieces. Please contact us with your ideas, preferred colors, and size requirements. We'll work with you to create something special for your little one.
ContactPage.faq_a3: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase for unworn, unwashed items in original packaging. Custom orders are non-returnable unless there's a defect. Please contact us to initiate a return.
ContactPage.faq_q4: How do I care for wooly products?
ContactPage.faq_a4: Hand wash in cold water with mild wool detergent. Gently squeeze out excess water (don't wring), reshape, and lay flat to dry. Never use a dryer. Store in a cool, dry place during warmer months.

HomePage.footer_description: Handmade accessories for little ones, crafted with love and care
HomePage.footer_rights: All rights reserved. Created with ❤️ for little ones.

section_1.title: Handmade clothes for little ones
section_1.text: We specialize in creating clothes for the youngest children from wool that ensures comfort and warmth. Each piece is carefully crafted to take care of every detail of your baby's wardrobe.

section_2.title: Discover out collection
section_2.text: We knit all kinds of clothes. From the smallest socks to warm winter bodysuits that will keep the youngest members of your family comfortable.

section_3.title: About us
section_3.text: Wolly Baby is a small Polish company created out of a passion for handicrafts. For many years, we have been creating handmade products for babies and we enjoy every piece of positive feedback.

ProductsPage.custom_description: We create custom orders tailored to your preferences. Choose your colors, patterns, and sizes.

ProductsPage.product_mittens_desc: Comfortable mittens with secure wrist closure. Perfect for outdoor play.
ProductsPage.product_scarf_desc: Handknitted scarf that keeps your child warm and stylish. Made from premium wool.
ProductsPage.product_sweater_desc: Timeless sweater design with beautiful patterns. Warm and durable.
ProductsPage.testimonial_1_text: The quality is outstanding! My daughter loves her new beanie and it keeps her so warm. Will definitely order more.
ProductsPage.testimonial_2_text: Beautiful handmade products. You can really feel the care and attention in every stitch. Highly recommend!
ProductsPage.testimonial_3_text: Perfect baby shower gift! The blanket is so soft and gorgeous. The parents were thrilled.
